# CPListItem.AssistantCellVisibility.off

**Case**

The assistant cell isn’t visible.

## Declaration

```swift
case off
```

## Controlling the Assistant Cell Visibility

- **CPListItem.AssistantCellVisibility.always**: The assistant cell is always visible.
- **CPListItem.AssistantCellVisibility.whileLimitedUIActive**: The assistant cell is visible only while Limited UI mode is active.

items.description: The assistant cell is always visible.
items.name: CPListItem.AssistantCellVisibility.always

items.description: The assistant cell is visible only while Limited UI mode is active.
